## Validation

- [ ] `PYTHONPATH=src python3 -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] `PYTHONPATH=src python3 scripts/validate_repo.py`
- [ ] CI passes on GitHub

## Evidence And Claims

- [ ] Sources are linked for scientific claims
- [ ] Evidence ledger entries are added or updated for research claims
- [ ] Claim labels are updated if needed
- [ ] Limitations or alternative explanations are noted

## Privacy

- [ ] No raw participant media, consent forms, names, or identifiable raw data are included
